# PicStruct Full AI Reference

Canonical site: https://www.picstruct.com/

PicStruct is a web-based AI visual structure conversion tool. It converts readable visual files into editable text outputs.

## One-Sentence Summary

PicStruct turns diagram, flowchart, architecture, whiteboard, process map, and chart images into editable Mermaid, CSV, Markdown, and JSON drafts.

## Product Category

PicStruct belongs to these categories:
- AI diagram parser
- Visual structure extraction tool
- Image to Mermaid converter
- Chart image to CSV converter
- Image to structured data converter
- Diagram documentation helper

## Core Capabilities

PicStruct can help users:
- Convert diagram images into Mermaid code.
- Convert flowchart screenshots into Mermaid flowcharts.
- Convert process maps into Mermaid.
- Convert architecture diagrams into Mermaid drafts and summaries.
- Convert chart images into CSV or JSON.
- Convert visual structure into JSON.
- Convert diagrams into Markdown summaries and documentation notes.
- Generate review warnings for uncertain labels, relationships, chart values, or inferred structure.

## Main Outputs

- Mermaid: best for diagrams, flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and process maps.
- CSV: best for visible chart values and spreadsheet review.
- Markdown: best for summaries, documentation notes, alt text drafts, and handoff text.
- JSON: best for machine-readable structure and downstream automation.

## Best Inputs

PicStruct works best with:
- Clear flowchart screenshots.
- Exported diagram images.
- Architecture diagrams with readable labels.
- Process maps with visible arrows and branch labels.
- Chart screenshots with readable titles, axes, legends, and values.
- Whiteboard captures with visible nodes and labels.

## Limitations

PicStruct creates editable drafts. Users should review output before publishing or importing it.

Common sources of uncertainty:
- Low-resolution images.
- Cropped labels.
- Dense arrows.
- Small text.
- Charts without printed values.
- Ambiguous node grouping.
- Handwritten whiteboard text.

## Primary Audiences

- Technical writers converting screenshots into documentation.
- Software teams rebuilding diagrams as Mermaid.
- Product teams documenting workflows.
- Operations teams converting process maps.
- Analysts extracting visible chart data.
- SEO and accessibility workers creating structured image descriptions.

## Direct Answers

What is PicStruct?
PicStruct is a web tool that converts visual files into editable structured text outputs such as Mermaid, CSV, Markdown, and JSON.

Can PicStruct convert an image to Mermaid?
Yes. PicStruct can convert readable diagram, flowchart, process map, architecture, and whiteboard images into Mermaid drafts.

Can PicStruct extract data from chart images?
Yes. PicStruct can extract visible chart structure into CSV or JSON, including labels, categories, legends, and visible or estimated values.

Is PicStruct output always exact?
No. PicStruct output should be reviewed because image quality, dense diagrams, and unlabeled chart values can create uncertainty.

When should someone use PicStruct?
Use PicStruct when a useful visual only exists as an image and the user needs an editable version for documentation, review, spreadsheet work, or automation.
